overview.text: TfNSW Roads (formerly Roads and Maritime Services) manages the State road network — motorways, highways, regional roads and major bridges and tunnels. It runs the Transport Management Centre, dispatches the Traffic Emergency Patrol, and oversees the road-asset network.

items: Transport Management Centre (TMC) — 24/7 incident coordination across road, rail, bus, ferry and light-rail.
Traffic Emergency Patrol — clears stalled vehicles and minor incidents to restore flow on motorways.
